data.current_summary: Update a task (also used for archive, unarchive, delete, restore)
data.summary_suggestion: Update task properties or change task state
data.description_suggestion: Updates task properties or modifies task state using PATCH semantics. Supports multiple operations: update task fields (title, description, assignee, etc.), archive a task, unarchive a task, delete a task, or restore a deleted task. The specific operation is determined by the fields provided in the TaskUpdate request body. Returns the updated task object. Partial updates are supported - only provided fields will be modified.
